name: Tofu & Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into 1/2-inch cubes and drain well on several layers of paper towels.
2. Separate and rinse cabbage; pat dry. Cut leaves crosswise into 1-inch strips and set aside.
3. Blend water, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, and 3 tablespoons soy sauce in a bowl.
4. Cut pork into thin slices, then into thin strips.
5. Combine remaining 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, ginger, garlic, and sugar in a small bowl; stir in pork.
6. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat. Add pork and stir-fry for 2 minutes; remove.
7. Heat remaining 1 tablespoon oil in the same pan. Add onion and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
8. Add cabbage and stir-fry for 1 minute. Add tomatoes; add pork, and soy sauce mixture.
9. Cook and stir gently until the sauce boils and thickens. Gently fold in tofu; heat through.
Source: Best Recipes, Kikkoman
Uploaded by Judi Phelps
